narrative:
Perry 14 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,095 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
